subcodes.first_line: O dawning place! The wine of divine mercy floweth from the fountainhead of heavenly grace, and its Bestower and Dispenser is that Most Merciful Countenance. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاور خمر رحمت ربانیه از معین عنایت جاری و معطی و مبذل آن طلعت رحمانی طوبی
